name: @zackees/memex
description: SQLite HTTP range-request client for memex databases

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js && npm run build:demo
scripts.build:wasm: npm run deps:patch && npm run wasm:prepare && webpack --config webpack.browser.config.js && node ./scripts/postbuild.mjs wasm
scripts.build:js: npm run deps:patch && npm run wasm:prepare && webpack --config webpack.node.config.js && node ./scripts/postbuild.mjs js
scripts.build:demo: npm run deps:patch && npm run wasm:prepare && webpack --config webpack.config.js
